title: InuYasha
titleNative: 犬夜叉
synonyms: อินุยาฉะ เทพอสูรจิ้งจอกเงิน
synopsis: Kagome Higurashi, an average ninth grader, gets pulled into an ancient well by a demon, bringing her 500 years in the past to the feudal era. There, she meets Inuyasha, a half-demon who seeks the Shikon Jewel to make himself a full-fledged demon. With Inuyasha and new friends, Kagome's search for the Jewel of Four Souls begins... (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team
titleRomaji: Kidou Senshi Gundam: Dai 08 MS Shotai
titleEnglish: Mobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team
titleNative: 機動戦士ガンダム 第08MS小隊
synopsis: UC 0079 - After the success of Operation Odessa, more and more Earth Federation soldiers are sent to earth to free it from the hands of the Principality of Zeon. As Zeonic troops retreat to unknown parts of the world, it's up to the Earth Federation Ground Force to find them and exterminate them. Ensign Shiro Amada is made leader of the 08th MS Team, leading a team of Ground Type Gundams into battle. His mission: to distract the enemy and find a mysterious new Zeon weapon. But can he complete it when he falls in love with a Zeon pilot, named Aina Sahalin? (Source: Otakufreakmk2, copyedited by Kolokotronis)

title: Rising Impact
titleNative: ライジングインパクト
synonyms: ไรซิ่ง อิมแพ็ค
synopsis: A young boy, Gawain, lives in a mountainous, rural area with an incredible love for baseball and making the ball really fly. One day he runs into a visitor to the small area and she introduces him to a sport that can really make a ball take to flight: golf! It just takes one shot and Gawain is hooked. With his grandpa's approval he sets off to Tokyo with this mysterious woman to learn all he can about golf, encountering many colorful characters and obstacles along the way.

synopsis: Spin-off of Boku no Kokoro no Yabai Yatsu based on a collection of short comics and small stories published on Twitter by original author Norio Sakurai. How do two people grow closer? There is a time and place for grand gestures, but it’s the small everyday moments that actually matter. (Source: HIDIVE)

title: The Elusive Samurai
titleNative: 逃げ上手の若君
synonyms: นายน้อยจอมโกยก้าวสู่เส้นทางแห่งวีรบุรุษ
synopsis: In the year 1333, the Kamakura shogunate government comes crumbling down. A trusted vassal, Ashikaga Takauji, betrays the shogunate and organizes a rebellion. Houjou Tokiyuki, the rightful heir, escapes the massacre with a Shinto priest named Suwa Yorishige to Kamakura. On the run and fighting to stay alive, Tokiyuki sets in motion his plan to reclaim his birthright. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Pokémon Concierge
titleNative: ポケモンコンシェルジュ
synopsis: Pack your bags—an all-new Pokémon paradise awaits! Introducing Pokémon Concierge , a new collaboration between Pokémon and Netflix featuring stop-motion animation by dwarf studio. Set in a resort on a tropical island resort for Pokémon, rookie concierge Haru and her partner Psyduck interact with trainers and Pokémon guests in this heartwarming story of growth. (Source: Official Pokémon YouTube video description, Netflix Anime, edited) Note: Announced on Pokémon Day 2023.

title: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc - Memorial Edition
titleEnglish: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc - Memorial Edition
titleNative: ベルセルク 黄金時代篇 MEMORIAL EDITION
synopsis: Kentaro Miura's legendary series returns in Berserk: The Golden Age Arc - Memorial Edition. The lone mercenary Guts travels a land where a century-old war is raging. His ferocity and skill in battle attract the attention of Griffith, the leader of a group of mercenaries called the Band of the Hawk. Guts becomes Griffith’s closest ally and confidant, but despite all their victories, Guts begins to question why he fights for another man’s dream of ruling his own kingdom. Unknown to Guts, Griffith’s unyielding ambition is about to bestow a horrible fate on them both. (Source: Crunchyroll, Viz Media) Note: This is a TV broadcast of the Golden Age film trilogy, with hundreds of new cuts including the "Bonfire of Dreams" scene and new music by Susumu Hirasawa and Shiro Sagisu.

จะยังไงภรรยาของผมก็น่ารัก
Красавица: Унеси меня на Луну. Форма
synopsis: In the Arisugawa family, Tsukasa and Nasa are enjoying their first year of marriage. Although the two did have their fateful encounter, they did not have the typical high school experience of falling in love and uniform dating; instead, Tsukasa put on a uniform with the help of Aya. Nasa couldn't contain his excitement when he saw Tsukasa wearing a uniformed secretary. What dramatic event will befall the two individuals? (Source: Bilibili)

title: Encouragement of Climb: Next Summit
titleNative: ヤマノススメ Next Summit
synopsis: The fourth season of Yama no Susume . Aoi Yukimura’s fear of heights won’t hold her back in the next adaptation of Encouragement of Climb! Joined by fellow mountaineering enthusiasts, including the spirited Hinata Kuraue and the other climbers they’ve met on their journey to great heights, Aoi and friends tackle tough challenges and conquer new summits while they embark on adventures throughout the mountain ranges of Japan. Fans new to the franchise will get to know the world of Encouragement of Climb via a selection of compilation episodes that reintroduce fan-favorite characters and beloved moments from the series. Later episodes contain all-new stories that continue the tale of Aoi and her ambition to overcome her fears and achieve her dreams. (Source: HIDIVE)

title: Tokyo Revengers
titleNative: 東京リベンジャーズ
synonyms: โตเกียวรีเวนเจอร์ส
โตเกียว卍รีเวนเจอร์ส
synopsis: Takemichi Hanagaki is a freelancer that's reached the absolute pits of despair in his life. He finds out that the only girlfriend he ever had in his life that he dated in middle school, Hinata Tachibana, had been killed by the ruthless Tokyo Manji Gang. The day after hearing about her death, he's standing on the station platform and ends up being pushed over onto the tracks by a herd of people. He closes his eyes thinking he's about to die, but when he opens his eyes back up, he somehow had gone back in time 12 years. Now that he's back living the best days of his life, Takemichi decides to get revenge on his life by saving his girlfriend and changing himself that he'd been running away from. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Case Closed: The Scarlet Bullet
titleNative: 名探偵コナン 緋色の弾丸
synonyms: Detective Conan Movie 24: The Scarlet Bullet
Meitantei Conan Movie 24: Hiiro no Dangan
Case Closed Movie 24: The Scarlet Bullet
名侦探柯南：绯色的子弹
synopsis: Japan is celebrating the upcoming World Sports Games (WSG), the world's largest sporting event, in Tokyo. The "Japanese Bullet," the world's first vacuum-tube super-conducting linear train, is built with the latest Japanese technology and timed to coincide with the WSG opening ceremonies. The train is set to run from Shin Nagoya Station to Tokyo Station at up to 1,000 kilometers per hour (about 600 miles per hour). However, a bizarre incident occurs during a party held by famous major sponsors, leading to a string of kidnappings of top executives. Conan deduces a possible link to serial abductions in the WSG 15 years earlier in Boston. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: ID: INVADED
titleNative: イド：インヴェイデッド
synopsis: Welcome to Kura, an organization that investigates crime using the Mizuhanome system which senses the drive to kill. Sakaido is a brilliant detective and pilot of the Mizuhanome. To solve a case, he enters the world of the killer's unconscious mind: the id well. In the shadows of brutal and puzzling cases lurks John Walker, the Serial Killer Creator. Where will Sakaido's pursuit lead? (Source: Funimation)

title: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
titleRomaji: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
titleNative: ＨＵＧっと！プリキュア♡ふたりはプリキュア オールスターズメモリーズ
synonyms: Hugtto! Pretty Cure x Futari wa Pretty Cure Movie: All Stars Memories
synopsis: Celebrating the 15th anniversary of the Precure franchise, and the eleventh Precure All Stars crossover film. A mysterious monster named Miden has appeared, stealing away the Precures' memories and reverting them to the state of a small child. The HUGtto! Precure team joins forces with the Futari wa Precure team to retrieve the stolen memories and powers of every other Precure team so far!

title: Snow White with the Red Hair
titleEnglish: Snow White with the Red Hair
titleNative: 赤髪の白雪姫
synonyms: สโนว์ไวท์ผมแดง
synopsis: In the kingdom of Tanbarun lives Shirayuki, an independent and strong-willed young woman. Her resourceful intelligence has led her become a skilled pharmacist, but her most defining trait is her shock of beautiful apple-red hair. Her dazzling mane gets her noticed by the prince of the kingdom, but instead of romancing her, he demands she be his concubine. Shirayuki refuses, chops off her lovely locks, and runs away to the neighboring kingdom of Clarines. There, she befriends a young man named Zen, who, SURPRISE, is also a prince, although with a much better temperament than the previous one. Watch as Shirayuki finds her place in the new kingdom, and in Zen’s heart. (Source: FUNimation)

title: Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun
titleNative: 月刊少女野崎くん
synopsis: You know how the story goes: girl crushes on guy, girl confesses feelings to guy, guy mistakes confession for a job application. Okay, maybe that's not how it usually goes, but that's what happens when Chiyo Sakura finally gets up the nerve to tell her classroom crush Nozaki how she feels. Since she doesn't know that he's secretly a manga artist who publishes under a female pen name, and he doesn't know that she doesn't know, he misunderstands and offers her a chance to work as his assistant instead of a date! But while it's not flowers and dancing, it is a chance to get closer to him, so Chiyo gamely accepts. And when Nozaki realizes how useful Chiyo can be in figuring out what girls find romantic, he'll be spending even more time with her "researching" while remaining completely clueless. Could Chiyo's romantic frustration possibly get any more drawn out of proportion? (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: A Lull in the Sea
titleNative: 凪のあすから
synonyms: Nagi no Asu Kara: Calmaria do Mar
Nagi no Asukara: Calma en el mar
synopsis: Since long ago, human civilization had lived on the ocean floor. However, there were many humans who wanted to live above the surface and they moved to land creating a fundamental separation between the two. After their school closes down, four 14-year-old middle school students from the sea village, Shioshishio, have to attend Mihama Middle School on the surface. What follows is their struggles to adjust to a new environment and the relationships between the sea and land people, while dealing with their own newfound feelings that have just started appearing with the end of their childhood. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Kokoro Connect ~ The OVAs
titleNative: ココロコネクト ミチランダム
synopsis: They've already had their bodies swapped like musical chairs, had their ages changed at random and experienced their deepest desires taking control of them without warning, but if you thought Heartseed was finished with Taichi, Iori, Himeko, Yoshifumi and Yui, you've got another thing coming! Now there's a new affliction going around, and the name of this peculiar bug is emotion sickness. As in, suddenly your emotions jump out of your body and sick someone else! Needless to say, that's more than simply awkward if you've got a deep rooted phobia like a fear of men or repressed emotions that you've been trying to keep hidden, but in some situations it can literally be deadly! What is Heartseed up to this time, and why is he making our heroes involuntarily share their innermost dirty laundry? (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: Clannad: Another World, Tomoyo Chapter
titleRomaji: CLANNAD: Mou Hitotsu no Sekai, Tomoyo-hen
titleNative: ＣＬＡＮＮＡＤ もうひとつの世界 智代編
synopsis: In an alternate universe to the original Clannad anime, Okazaki Tomoya is dating Sakagami Tomoyo in the 24th and final episode of Clannad. When Tomoyo is elected Student Council President, her dream to save the school's cherry blossom trees from being cut down begins to come to fruition. However, her never-ending duties and bad rumors about their relationship spread by fellow students due to Tomoya's reputation as a delinquent create a rift between the two. As Tomoya watches Tomoyo rise higher and higher into the distance, their relationship is stretched to the limit by a society that threatens to break them apart.
